title: Half joking theory of what Gendo said to Ritsuko
display_title: Half joking theory of what Gendo said to Ritsuko
wikitext:
[]: Half-joking theory of what Gendo said to Ritsuko Post by StevieC » Sat Aug 30, 2008 11:01 pm In the original Japanese, the part we heard was, "Akagi Ritsuko-kun, hontou ni" Given their history, the intended English translation could very possibly be, "Frankly my dear..." and I think we ALL know what the other half is to THAT line! Thoughts?

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 31, 2008 2:24 am 0% chance that somebody didn't think of this over a decade ago.

[]: Post by The Imperialist » Sun Aug 31, 2008 6:19 am "I actually hated you. Now sod off." And the equivalent in Japanese.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Aug 31, 2008 10:18 am To save you the trouble of a 30-something page archived thread from ANF, what Gendo ACTUALLY said to Ritsuko was: "The truth is/I truly...... have no regrets concerning my work." Gendo also said this to Naoko in the episode 20 flashback (a young Ritsuko watched this exchange from afar), and it was even stated that there was one clue Anno told Ritsuko's seiyuu for her to figure out what the line was about. Either way, the fact it was able bring Ritsuko to disbelief then tears along with the betrayal of her mother showed it had to be something that emotionally upsetting to hear. (I know this is a chit chat thread but silly versions of what Gendo said were already done somewhere. I think that stuff has been locked or was in an unrelated topic.)

[]: Post by NAveryW » Sun Aug 31, 2008 12:08 pm We can lock this thread, right?

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Aug 31, 2008 12:15 pm I think it can be used for serious discussion of this topic if anybody wants to.

[]: Post by chazthesilencer » Sun Aug 31, 2008 1:46 pm I suppose we could come up with a joking list of potential blank-fillers... Then again, this concept was covered by that flash, and then some. NAveryW wrote: We can lock this thread, right?

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Aug 31, 2008 2:15 pm It is better to let a thread descend gently with benign neglect than to shit all over it with lock-related comments. I may start getting grumpy if the trend continues.

[]: Post by NemZ » Sun Aug 31, 2008 3:54 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: (logic)

[]: Post by mrpanda » Sun Aug 31, 2008 6:21 pm The truth is im gay.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 31, 2008 7:27 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: To save you the trouble of a 30-something page archived thread from ANF, what Gendo ACTUALLY said to Ritsuko was: "The truth is/I truly...... have no regrets concerning my work."

Thoughts?

[]: P
